name: Coffee Cake Recip-Ease
recipeInstructions:
COFFEE CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch pan.
Combine all ingredients except for streusel topping in a mixing bowl. Blend well. Pour into prepared pan. Sprinkle with streusel topping. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
STREUSEL TOPPING: Mix ingredients until crumbly.
